name_en: Tan Grainy Leather with Gold Buckle · 26cm
name_cn:
Tan Grainy Leather with Gold Buckle · 26cm
The most elegant accordion bag series sac de jour, a timeless classic. Exquisite grainy cowhide with clear texture and a rich luster, very luxurious! Comes with a middle divider inside the 26cm size, can be removed to use as a clutch. The strap is adjustable, choose the length you prefer! The logo is very small, perfectly embodying the understated luxury style~
Model: 421863/477477
Size: 26x20.5x12.5cm
(Comes with a middle divider inside the 26cm size)
